warning: Research reproducibility code for formulas, serialization, and deterministic symbolic test vectors only; not production cryptographic software.

table14_serialization_model.note: These are the representative serialized lengths used in Table 14. Raw symbolic demonstration lengths may be larger because the test-vector engine expands powers before deterministic reduction. Table 14 uses the stated representative serialization model, not raw expanded symbolic word length.

word_model.normalization: adjacent inverse-pair free reduction with stable serializer
